fields.name: Period Name
fields.tooltip: Specifies the name of the accounting period. it is a good idea to use descriptive names, such as Month01, 1st Month, 1st Month/2000, Month01-2000, M1-2001/2002, etc.

fields.name: Period Start
fields.tooltip: Specifies on which date the period starts, such as the first day of March, if the period is Month.

fields.name: Sales Orders
fields.tooltip: Specifies amounts related to sales orders.

fields.name: Fixed Assets Disposal
fields.tooltip: Specifies amounts related to fixed assets disposal.

fields.name: Cash Flow Manual Revenues
fields.tooltip: Specifies amounts related to manual revenues.

fields.name: Purchase Orders
fields.tooltip: Specifies amounts related to purchase orders.

fields.name: Fixed Assets Budget
fields.tooltip: Specifies amounts related to fixed assets.

fields.name: Cash Flow Manual Expenses
fields.tooltip: Specifies amounts related to manual expenses.

fields.name: G/L Budget
fields.tooltip: Specifies amounts related to the general ledger budget.
